title: Women Entrepreneurs in Rural Areas: Follow-up Interviews 2016
description: The dataset consists of interviews with female entrepreneurs in the North Karelia and Pirkanmaa regions in Finland. The interviews are follow-ups to interviews conducted in 2001-2002 and 2009 (FSD2508 Women Entrepreneurs in Rural Areas 2001-2009). Of the 18 individuals who took part in the previous interview round, 11 participated in the follow-up interviews. The interviews charted the interviewees' business activities as women in rural areas, the problems and benefits of rural entrepreneurship,
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
